title: Corruption due to REPLACE in an auto-vacuumed database
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, data BLOB NOT NULL, description TEXT DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO t2 VALUES(1, randomblob(512), 'Initial data');
INSERT INTO t2 VALUES(1, randomblob(1024), NULL);
key_bug_features: REPLACE in an auto-vacuumed database causes corruption
